name: drmshield
description: DRMShield — run the server, client, and ARQX Atlas agent together

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client,agent -c blue,green,magenta "CLIENT_ORIGIN=http://localhost:${CLIENT_PORT:-5180} npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev -- --port ${CLIENT_PORT:-5180} --strictPort" "AGENT_ALLOWED_ORIGIN=http://localhost:${CLIENT_PORT:-5180} sh scripts/run-agent.sh"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
